serverStatus.title: Server status
serverStatus.idle: Press refresh to check server status.

cardExplorer.title: Search and explore Magic cards
cardExplorer.intro: Use live Scryfall search to browse cards, inspect artwork, mana cost, and type information in one place.
cardExplorer.searchHint: Search updates as you type with a short debounce.
cardExplorer.emptyBody: Type a card name, set code, or Scryfall query to load results.
cardExplorer.noResultsBody: No cards matched "{{ query }}". Try another name or a broader Scryfall query.
cardExplorer.errorBody: The card service could not return results right now. Try again in a moment.
